caption:
Your most productive year looked like nothing.

When you left your last role, the world stopped making sense. Your title was gone. The question everyone asks had no clean answer.

That silence is not failure. It is the forge.

Sara Blakely spent 7 years selling fax machines with no plan for what came next. She called those years her accidental MBA. Spanx launched in 2000 from everything she absorbed in that drift.

You cannot think your way into your next identity. You can only wander your way there. The year that looks like nothing often builds everything.

If you are in the in-between right now, save this. It is your map.
hook: Your most productive year looked like nothing.
